project: Data Quality Audit for CSV Logs
rules: Reflect limits in planning and execution artifacts
notes: Include the exact dependency line: "Dependencies: T3 depends on T1 and T2" in the final plan
Include the literal substrings "budget tier: caution", "max concurrent: 3", and "retry limit: 3" in the final plan
Task-2 output must mention both "max concurrent agents: 3" and "budget tier: caution"
Hallucination report must list exactly 14 lines from H-1 PASS to H-14 PASS
